The '''Arrest over Atzerri''' began when [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces under the command of [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] attacked a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] enclave on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Jabiim/Legends|Jabiim]].

==Prelude==
It was learned from the location that the traitor who had been plaguing the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] by relaying vital information to the rebellion was [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kalast]]. [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] demanded that the traitor be brought in for questioning. Kalast was found on the planet of [[Atzerri/Legends|Atzerri]], where he owned a personal private estate.

==The battle==
The Imperial fleet arrived at Atzerri and requested that Kalast surrender himself. Kalast refused and used his own Imperial [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] as well as an attack force of Rebel Alliance ships and a station to hold off the Imperial fleet. While damage was done to Kalast's ship, he quickly jumped into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] to avoid capture. The Rebel forces were quickly defeated by the Imperial fleet, but the traitor had escaped.

==Behind the scenes==
This battle was the ninth mission of the Imperial campaign in the [[2006]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]''.

*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'' {{1st}}
